name: How to add your business to vitals.com
description: Learn how to increase your online visibility and attract more customers by adding your business to vitals.com. Follow our step-by-step guide today.
main_title: How to add your business to vitals.com
richtext:
What is Vitals.com and why is it important?

Vitals.com is an online platform where patients can find and rate healthcare providers, including physicians. Having an account on Vitals.com can help physicians attract new patients and manage their online reputation by showcasing their credentials and responding to patient reviews.

‍

Step-by-step guide to add your business to Vitals.com

‍

  1. Go to the Vitals.com website.
  1. Click on the "Top Navigation" menu: On the top right corner of the homepage, you will see a link labeled "List Your Practice" Click on it.

‍

  1. Enter your physician details: Such as the name, your contact information, and your company. You will also be asked to provide details such as your business's specialties, hours of operation, insurance information, and more.

‍

  1. Once you have filled your information, Click ‘Claim Profile’

‍

  1. Physician profiles on Vitals.com are verified within 2 business days for directory listings accuracy.

‍

Healthgrades.com and Ratemds.com are other platforms that provide information on physicians' specialties, education, and patient reviews. Having a profile on Healthgrades.com & Ratemds.com can increase physicians' online visibility and attract new patients, helping to build a successful practice.

‍
